name: Speaker: KubeCon + CloudNativeCon Europe 2026
description: Earners of this badge are speakers, selected by the KubeCon + CloudNativeCon Europe 2026 Co-Chairs, who have provided thought-leadership and shared best practices with attendees during their talk(s) at KubeCon + CloudNativeCon Europe 2026. They are Open Source and Cloud Native Technology Subject Matter Experts on the topic(s) they presented.

name: Organizer - 2024 Cloud Native Community Group
description: Earners of this badge are community members volunteering their time to execute a CNCF Chapter meetups through the Cloud Native Community Group program (CNCG). The earners have lent their expertise alongside fellow program organizers to manage logistics, with the end goal of helping spread the knowledge of Cloud Native. Organizers perform tasks like curating content, securing sponsorships and venues, finding swag to give away, promoting their meetups, and often times executing virtual events.

name: CNCF Ambassador - H1 2024 - 2026
description: Cloud Native Ambassadors (CNAs) are credible advocates for the cloud native ecosystem, driven by their passion for CNCF technologies, projects, and furthering the open source mission.

description: Cloud Native Ambassadors (CNAs) are credible advocates for the cloud native ecosystem, driven by their passion for CNCF technologies, projects, and furthering the open source mission.

name: Organizer - 2025 Cloud Native Community Group
description: Earners of this badge are volunteer organizers of CNCF Community Groups who dedicate their time to running chapter meetups and advancing cloud native adoption. They support logistics, curate content, secure venues and sponsorships, promote events, manage swag, and often host virtual sessions. Badge earners have demonstrated sustained, year-round engagement.

name: Contributor - KCD São Paulo, Brazil 2024
description: This badge recognizes the contributions of individuals involved in the KCD São Paulo, Brazil 2024 event, carefully selected by the organizers. Including speakers that shared invaluable insights, expertise, and passion for Cloud Native technologies, and volunteers that are the backbone of the event, dedicating their time and skills to ensure seamless operations and an unforgettable experience for all participants.

name: Track Chair: KubeCon + CloudNativeCon Europe 2023
description: Earners of this badge are subject matter experts, selected by the KubeCon + CloudNativeCon Europe 2023 Co-Chairs, who have lent their time and expertise to further review proposals reviewed by the program committee and create short lists of talks from their assigned track to recommend for acceptance, assisting in the selection of high quality talks for the KubeCon + CloudNativeCon Europe 2023 agenda. name: Exam Contributor: OpenTelemetry Certified Associate
description: Earners of this designation are recognized by the Linux Foundation for their contributions in supporting a Linux Foundation certification program by helping to write or review exam content (up to 20% exposure). If an earner attempts an exam and a passing score is achieved, an Exam Contributor may become certified.

name: Observability Day North America 2023 Program Committee Member Badge
description: Earners of this badge are subject matter experts, selected by Cloud Native Computing Foundation. They have lent their time and expertise, along with fellow program committee members, to review and rate submitted speaking proposals and to assist in selecting high-quality talks for the Observability Day North America 2023 conference agenda.

name: Observability Day EU 2025 Program Committee Member Badge
